india_trends.title: Credit flows jump 38% in FY26 as RBI easing boosts demand
india_trends.summary: India's formal loan systems saw a significant surge in FY26, marking a strong revival in borrowing demand. This growth followed a contraction in the previous year. The Reserve Bank of India's policy rate cuts and liquidity infusion spurred lending. Credit expansion reached ₹44.6 lakh crore. Outstand

india_trends.title: Gold Gains on Iran Talks Optimism With Fed Outlook in Focus
india_trends.summary: Gold advanced on optimism that the US and Iran are moving toward talks after days of deadlock, with traders also asessing the Federal Reserve’s interest rate path after the Justice Department dropped a probe of Chair Jerome Powell.

india_trends.title: Charter Shares Fall Most Ever After Disappointing Results
india_trends.summary: Charter Communications Inc. shares fell the most ever after the company reported “underwhelming” quarterly results.

india_trends.title: Consumers to soon get data on power generated & used
india_trends.summary: The framework could allow electricity bills to be issued as digital credentials on DigiLocker or other platforms, Prince Dhawan, executive director at REC Ltd, told ET. REC is the nodal agency for implementing the India Energy Stack.

india_trends.title: Ex-CEA Ashok Lahiri to be next NITI Vice-Chairman
india_trends.summary: Former Chief Economic Adviser Ashok Lahiri is set to become the new vice-chairman of NITI Aayog, replacing Suman Bery. Lahiri, a member of the 15th Finance Commission and currently a West Bengal MLA, previously served as CEA under Prime Minister Atal Bihari Vajpayee. Gobardhan Das will also join the

india_trends.title: Groupe ADP to sell up to 7.3% stake in GMR Airports Ltd
india_trends.summary: French airport operator Groupe ADP is set to sell up to 7.3 percent of its stake in GMR Airports Ltd. The deal involves the early purchase of convertible bonds by the GMR Promoter Group. This transaction is anticipated to yield approximately 924 million in post-tax cash proceeds.

india_trends.title: Government says fertiliser supply adequate, no shortage concerns ahead of Kharif season
india_trends.summary: India's fertilizer supply is robust and more than sufficient. Data confirms availability exceeds demand for key nutrients. Stocks are high ahead of the kharif season. The government is working to prevent hoarding and ensure timely distribution. Global sourcing and stable domestic production strength

india_trends.title: US slaps 123% anti-dumping duty on Indian solar imports
india_trends.summary: India's solar industry said the decision to impose steep preliminary anti-dumping duties on cells and modules from India will have limited immediate impact on domestic exporters, but remains a matter of concern.

india_trends.title: US slaps 123% anti-dumping duty on Indian solar imports
india_trends.summary: India's solar industry said the decision to impose steep preliminary anti-dumping duties on cells and modules from India will have limited immediate impact on domestic exporters, but remains a matter of concern.

india_trends.title: ‘Mythos’ AI threat: FM tells banks to build stronger defences
Amazon shares rise over 3% to record high after tie-up with Meta to supply Graviton chips
india_trends.summary: Amazon shares rose 3.2% to $263.13 after announcing a deal to supply Graviton processors to Meta, which also saw a 3.3% increase. The partnership aims to enhance Meta's AI capabilities and marks a significant collaboration in the tech industry.

india_trends.title: Promoters Buying: 9 Nifty 500 stocks that saw stake hikes in March quarter
india_trends.summary: Promoters are showing increased confidence in several Nifty 500 companies. Their shareholding has risen in the March 2026 quarter compared to the December 2025 quarter. This trend suggests optimism about future company performance. Investors may find this a positive indicator. Companies like Godrej

india_trends.title: Lodha Developers targets ₹24,000 crore in housing sales in FY27
india_trends.summary: The company recorded a 21% year-on-year jump in revenue from operations to ₹16,676 crore in FY26 compared to ₹13,779.5 crore in the preceding year, on account of sustained sales through the year, according to a stock exchange filing late Friday evening.

india_trends.title: Procter & Gamble stock surges over 3% after third quarter profit beats expectations
india_trends.summary: P&amp;G also cautioned regarding an approximate $1 billion after-tax impact on its fiscal 2027 earnings due to soaring oil costs

india_trends.title: Avis stock's roller coaster drags US' big index Dow Jones Transportation Average along for the ride
india_trends.summary: Avis Budget shares experienced a dramatic 70% plunge, following a massive surge, highlighting meme stock exuberance. This volatility significantly impacted the Dow Jones Transportation Average, a long-standing economic barometer, revealing limitations of its price-weighted structure compared to mark

india_trends.title: Govt forms panel under SBI chief C S Setty to assess Mythos-related risks
india_trends.summary: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman announced a panel led by SBI Chairman C S Setty to assess risks from AI platform Mythos and devise mitigation strategies. Banks will collaborate to understand threats and identify investment needs for countering AI-driven challenges.

india_trends.title: JioMart network serves 1,200 cities through 3,100 stores: Reliance Retail CFO Dinesh Taluja
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail hyperlocal commerce arm JioMart has built the widest network in the country, serving 1,200 cities through 3,100 stores, a mix of dark stores and walk-in outlets, Reliance Retail CFO Dinesh Taluja said during the earnings call.

india_trends.title: Lodha Developers plans to grow annuity income by 10 times to Rs 3,000 cr
india_trends.summary: Lodha Developers plans a significant expansion of its annuity income, targeting over Rs 3,000 crore in six years. This growth will be fueled by new developments in data centers, retail, warehousing, and offices. The company is investing heavily in data centers, with plans for a large facility near M

world_trends.summary: Nvidia is finally on track to finish back in $5 trillion territory, capping off an “incredible week” for chip makers.
